name: Hydraulique P.B Societe anonyme
summary: Hydraulique P.B Soci√É¬©t√É¬© anonyme engages in the engineering and production of hydraulic cylinders. It offers single acting, double acting, and double acting telescopic cylinders, as well as cylinders for the chemical and foodstuff industry. The company provides its products for use in agricultural and construction machines; and lifting/handling, environment, industry, and transportation applications. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Darney, France.
